$comment: Content-pinning lockfile for the sources.yaml mirrors (scripts/sync-external.mjs). Each entry pins one upstream source: the resolved upstream commit and a sha256 per mirrored file. The diff of this file is the security review surface — a drifted source is quarantined by the sync and only re-baselined via an explicit --relock=<source> / --relock-all after human review. Managed by scripts/sync-lockfile.mjs; do not hand-edit digests.
